headline: Ferrari Ties AI Fan Experience And F1 Upgrades To Brand Power
summary: Ferrari (BIT:RACE) and IBM have introduced AI driven upgrades to the official Scuderia Ferrari app, aimed at personalizing the fan experience around Formula 1. At the same time, Ferrari has revealed extensive aerodynamic changes to its SF-26 Formula 1 car ahead of the Miami Grand Prix. For investors watching BIT:RACE, these updates highlight two key areas of focus: digital engagement and Formula 1 performance. Ferrari already operates across luxury road cars, racing, and branded...

headline: IBM Debuts New AI-Powered Features for the Scuderia Ferrari App
summary: As the Formula 1 season arrives in United States for the first time in 2026 for the Formula 1 Miami Grand Prix, IBM (NYSE: IBM) and Ferrari today introduced – new and enhanced AI powered capabilities to the Scuderia Ferrari app experience. The highly interactive features were designed to bring Scuderia Ferrari's passionate global fanbase of nearly 400 million Tifosi closer than ever to the team, the drivers and the cars they love – on race day and beyond.

headline: Private Equity's AI Moment: The Greatest Value Lever in Decades -- and the Hardest to Pull
summary: Next week at Think 2026, we'll outline the forces shaping the Enterprise AI Race, forces that apply with particular urgency to private equity. The organizations gaining ground today are not the ones betting on a single model. They are the ones redesigning how their businesses operate, building hybrid architectures that give them control, and deploying AI in ways that orchestrate value that compounds over time.
